module.name: require-interface-prefix
module.description: Enforce that interface names start with "I".

scenarios.name: should allow an interface whose name starts with 'I'
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the interface declaration

scenarios.name: should allow a type alias that is not an interface
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the type alias

scenarios.name: should report an interface whose name does not start with 'I'
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the interface declaration

scenarios.name: should report an interface whose name starts with a lowercase letter
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the interface declaration
